calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award; Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER UBS FINANCIAL SERVICES INC.'s Hearing On Petitioner'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award; Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award.

UBS Financial Services, Inc.'s motion to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
